route_desc: Daily train service between Auburn, Sacramento, Oakland and San Jose
Daily train service between Auburn, Sacramento, Oakland and San Jose
Daily train service between Auburn, Sacramento, Oakland and San Jose

The 50 Express operates every hour from 6:00 AM until 8:00 PM Monday through Friday, with service from Placerville Station Transfer Center to the Folsom Iron Point light rail station, Folsom Lake College, and back.

The Cameron Park/Shingle Springs route loops around Cameron Park and Shingle Springs every hour from 6:30 AM to 7:20 PM Monday through Friday, providing transfers to the 50 Express and Sacramento Commuter at Cambridge Road Park & Ride.
The Diamond Springs route loops around Diamond Springs, including service to the El Dorado campus of Folsom Lake College, hourly Monday through Friday from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM.

The Placerville route provides local service around the town of Placerville from 6:30 AM to 7:25 PM Monday through Friday, and connections to other El Dorado Transit routes at the Placerville Station Transfer Center.

The Pollock Pines route provides service from the Placerville Station Transfer Center to the Safeway Plaza in Pollock Pines every hour from 7:00 AM to 6:55 PM Monday through Friday. Service includes stops along the Pony Express Trail.

The Sacramento Commuter provides 5 trips in the morning from Park and Ride locations in Western El Dorado County to downtown Sacramento and 6 return trips in the afternoons Monday through Friday, as well as Reverse Commuter trips twice daily.
The Saturday Express operates Saturdays only from  9:00 AM to 4:55 PM providing trips from the Missouri Flat Transfer Center in Placerville to Safeway Plaza in Pollock Pines.

The Arcata Green & Gold Loop operates within the City of Arcata Monday through Friday while Cal Poly Humboldt is in session. It serves downtown Arcata, CalPoly Humboldt, Valley West Shopping Center, and Alliance Rd.
The Arcata Gold Loop operates within the City of Arcata Monday through Friday. It serves downtown Arcata, CalPoly Humboldt, Valley West Shopping Center, and Alliance Rd.

The Arcata Orange Loop operates within the City of Arcata Monday through Friday 7pm-10pm while Cal Poly Humboldt is in session, and 7am-7pm on Saturday and Holidays. It serves downtown Arcata, Sunny Brae, Greenview Market, CalPoly Humboldt, Valley West Shopping Center, and Alliance Rd.
The Arcata Red Loop operates within the City of Arcata Monday through Friday. It serves downtown Arcata, Greenview Market, Arcata Community Center, Sunny Brae, CalPoly Humboldt, and LK Wood Blvd.
The Eureka Purple Loop operates within the City of Eureka, Monday through Friday. It serves downtown, Silvercrest, General Hospital, Buhne St., Harris St., H St., I St, and West St.
The Eureka Gold Loop operates within the City of Eureka Monday through Saturday. It serves downtown Eureka, Bayview, Pine Hill, Bayshore Mall, Harris St, and E St.
The Eureka Green Loop is operates within the City of Eureka Monday through Friday. It serves the hospitals, Silvercrest, Myrtletown, Harris St., and Bayshore Mall.
The Eureka Red Loop operates within the City of Eureka, Monday through Friday. It serves Costco, the Forest Service, Bayshore Mall, Harris St, Campton Rd., Cutten, and California St.
The Eureka Rainbow Loop operates within the City of Eureka on Saturdays only. It serves Old Town, Target, Silvercrest, Myrtletown, St Joseph Hospital, Henderson Center, and Bayshore Mall.

The Redwood Transit System runs Monday through Saturday. It operates mainly along Redwood Coast Highway 101 providing deviated fixed route service into the communities of Trinidad, Mckinleyville, Valley West, Arcata, Cal Poly Humboldt, Manila, Eureka, Humboldt Hill, King Salmon, Fields Landing, College of the Redwoods, Loleta, Fernbridge, Fortuna, Rio Dell and Scotia.

The Southern Humboldt Line runs Monday through Saturday. It operates along Redwood Coast Highway 101 between Eureka and Benbow providing deviated fixed route service into the communities of Garberville, Redway, Redwood, Phillipsville, South Fork, Myers Flat, Weott, Rio Dell, Fortuna, Eureka.

The North State Express 299 runs Monday through Saturday. It operates along Trinity Highway 299 between Arcata and Willow Creek providing deviated fixed route service into the communities of Arcata, Valley West, Blue Lake and Willow Creek.

The North State Express 101 runs Monday through Saturday. It operates along Redwood Coast Highway 101 between Eureka and Ukiah providing express fixed route service to the communities of Eureka, Fortuna, Garberville, Leggett, Laytonville, Willits and Ukiah.

route_short_name: Downtown Inglewood Station -  Intuit Dome Express
route_desc: The express shuttle will operate between Downtown Inglewood Station and Intuit Dome. Shuttle service will run every 20 minutes to the event, beginning roughly 2 hours before the event begins and run from the event every 10 minutes ending roughly 1 hour after the event concludes. Metro express service to Intuit Dome is FREE, but normal fares apply for regular Metro Bus and Rail service and parking fees at Metro Park & Ride lots

route_short_name: LAX / Metro Transit Center -  Intuit Dome Express
route_desc: The express shuttle will operate between the Metro LAX / Metro Transit Center and Intuit Dome. Shuttle service will run every 20 minutes to the event, beginning roughly 2 hours before the event begins and run from the event every 10 minutes ending roughly 1 hour after the event concludes. Metro express service to Intuit Dome is FREE, but normal fares apply for regular Metro Bus and Rail service and parking fees at Metro Park & Ride lots

route_short_name: LAX / Metro Transit Center -  SoFi Stadium Express
route_desc: The express shuttle will operate between the Metro LAX / Metro Transit Center and SoFi Stadium. Shuttle service will run every 5 minutes beginning roughly 3 hours before the event begins and ending roughly 1.5 hours after the event concludes. During the event, shuttles will depart SoFi to the LAX / Metro Transit Center as needed. Metro express service to SoFi Stadium is FREE, but normal fares apply for regular Metro Bus and Rail service and parking fees at Metro Park & Ride lots
